Class SolarisNetworkIF.IfStats

java.lang.Object
oshi.hardware.common.platform.unix.solaris.SolarisNetworkIF.IfStats
Enclosing class:
SolarisNetworkIF
public static final class SolarisNetworkIF.IfStats extends Object
Per-interface stats the Solaris HAL reads. Both JNA and FFM concrete subclasses populate this.
